name: Two Sum
notes: Used hash map to store complements. Achieved O(n) time complexity. Key insight: store value-index pairs in map for quick lookup.

name: Add Two Numbers
notes: Careful with carry-over handling. Need to handle case where carry exists after both lists are exhausted.

name: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
notes: Sliding window approach. Use hash map to track character indices. Update window when duplicate found.

name: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
notes: Binary search approach is optimal O(log(min(m,n))). Need to understand partition concept clearly.

name: Reverse Integer
notes: Handle overflow case. Use conditions to check before multiplying/adding to avoid integer overflow.

name: Merge K Sorted Lists
notes: Multiple approaches: 1) Min-heap 2) Merge sort 3) Divide and conquer. Need to practice more.

name: LRU Cache
notes: Use HashMap + Doubly Linked List. HashMap for O(1) access, LinkedList for O(1) eviction.

name: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
notes: BFS using queue. Process level by level. Track queue size at each level.

name: Word Ladder
notes: BFS approach. Build adjacency list based on word patterns. Need to think about graph construction.

name: Number of Islands
notes: DFS/BFS solution. Mark visited cells. Time: O(m*n), Space: O(m*n) for recursion stack.
